mapper.insert: insert into book_borrow_detail (borrow_order_id, borrow_order_no, member_id, book_id, book_name, borrow_qty, returned_qty, purchase_qty, borrow_status, borrow_time, remark, first_staff_id, first_staff_name, last_staff_id, last_staff_name, created_at) values (#{borrowOrderId}, #{borrowOrderNo}, #{memberId}, #{bookId}, #{bookName}, #{borrowQty}, 0, 0, 1, now(), #{remark}, #{firstStaffId}, #{firstStaffName}, #{firstStaffId}, #{firstStaffName}, now())
mapper.select: select * from book_borrow_detail where id = #{id} and is_del = 0
select * from book_borrow_detail where id = #{id} and is_del = 0 for update
select * from book_borrow_detail where borrow_order_id = #{borrowOrderId} and is_del = 0
select * from book_borrow_detail where member_id = #{memberId} and is_del = 0 order by created_at desc

select d.id as detailId, d.id as borrowDetailId, d.borrow_order_no as orderNo, d.member_id as memberId, d.book_id as bookId, d.book_name as bookName, d.borrow_status as borrowStatus, d.borrow_qty as borrowQty, coalesce(d.returned_qty, 0) as returnedQty, coalesce(d.purchase_qty, 0) as purchaseQty, d.borrow_qty - coalesce(d.returned_qty, 0) - coalesce(d.purchase_qty, 0) as remainingQty, d.purchase_order_no as purchaseOrderNo, cast(unix_timestamp(d.borrow_time) * 1000 as signed) as borrowTime, cast(unix_timestamp(coalesce(d.return_all_time, o.return_all_time)) * 1000 as signed) as returnAllTime, cast(unix_timestamp(o.expected_return_time) * 1000 as signed) as expectedReturnTime, coalesce(d.remark, o.remark) as remark
order by d.borrow_time desc, d.id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select coalesce(sum(greatest(0, borrow_qty - coalesce(returned_qty, 0) - coalesce(purchase_qty, 0))), 0) from book_borrow_detail where member_id = #{memberId} and is_del = 0
